playbooks.root_cause: Flaky integration test hangs the pipeline instead of failing fast; recurs and is never root-caused because it is deprioritized each time.
alternative_hypotheses: CI runner exhaustion during build peaks
playbook: Add a hard 10-min timeout to the integration-tests step so it fails fast.
Instrument the step to emit the name of the currently running test.
Reproduce with --repeat 50 to isolate the flaky test.
Quarantine the flaky test and open a tracked fix ticket.
Add a pipeline alert if the step exceeds the timeout again.

playbooks.root_cause: Login session/token is likely invalidated by the renewal billing webhook before the auth service refreshes it.
playbook: Trace the renewal webhook → auth token refresh sequence for a failing user.
Ensure the auth service refreshes/rotates the session on renewal events.
Add an integration test for the renew → immediate-login path.
Invalidate the entitlement cache on renewal completion.

playbooks.root_cause: Intermittent 502s on the recommendations endpoint correlate with traffic peaks — likely connection-pool exhaustion or a downstream timeout under load.
alternative_hypotheses: Upstream dependency latency spike during peak hours
playbook: Check connection-pool saturation and upstream timeouts during 7–9pm peak.
Add/raise pool limits and set sane client timeouts + retries with backoff.
Add a circuit breaker to the downstream call.
Load-test at peak concurrency to confirm the fix.

playbooks.root_cause: Rising SES bounce rate on transactional emails points to a sending-domain reputation or template issue, not a one-off delay.
alternative_hypotheses: SPF/DKIM/DMARC misalignment on the sending domain
playbook: Review SES bounce/complaint metrics and categorize bounce types.
Verify SPF/DKIM/DMARC on the sending domain.
Warm up / segment sending; pause to protect reputation if needed.
Add alerting on bounce rate crossing 1%.
